creator: reg@shale.csir.co.za
text:
Mega update of GNOME ports.  Mostly changes to USE_LIBTOOL, plus
	several updates.  Massive clean-up - I've had to gzip the diff
	because of the amount of removed patching.

	Bump some shared library numbers so that people should get the
	lastest ports, and also include most of the GNOME ports in
	x11/gnome.  Install gnome-pty-helper.

	I've not contacted the maintainers, since I've lost track.  Maybe
	give them 48 hours to yell foul.
